base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v2 validation macro_f1 across the frozen three-epoch schedule
expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
decision: temperature-scale logits using validation only without sharpening below temperature 1.0
treat trusted crop-cycle metadata as authoritative for the supported crop
restrict the health decision to expected-crop healthy/disease plus the explicit invalid logit
use no visual crop-mismatch or additional confidence rejection
test_disclosure: The immutable test was observed for v6 under the older 0.9 crop-mismatch contract. This trusted-metadata contract was selected from v2 validation behavior and product semantics without inspecting v6 per-example test logits. Independent fresh field validation is still required.
